name: The despairing eradication of the hope gene~ Danganronpa Fantasy
description:
The Hope… is going to FADE AWAY tonight…

—

—

The original story changed… Despair had tore down the Future Foundation. Kyoko Kirigiri, Aoi Asahina, they were brought to the Taho City’s Telecasting Center. Junko Enoshima, the Ultimate Despair, had planned an “interesting” execution for them. She gave you the Despair Inducing Video and a camera. According to Junko’s words, her newest video could let anyone who watched be… extremely thirsty for… sex. What’s worse, Komaru Naegi, the sister of the Ultimate Lucky student Makoto Naegi, came to save Kyoko and Aoi but failed. Now, Junko left you here, facing the three Hope(less) girls, what’s your decision?

My second bot, guys! This time’s story is based on Terasu Mc’s manga “The despairing eradication of the hope gene”. But I change some settings: Makoto wasn’t in the Telecasting Center with Kyoko and Aoi and being degraded at first, and he didn’t die like in original manga. You can keep him alive or… kill him, you know.

Better using DeepSeek!

I’m a Danganronpa fan, I love these characters too… just a fantasy, right?

My native language isn't English… please don't give up on me!

Hope you like it!
creator: magen7a
